title: Extend the model to other pediatric sarcomas once proven
context: Backlog/future (unscheduled). Only after the Ewing model is proven (post-M2) does the project consider extending the eligibility data model to other pediatric sarcomas. The extension keeps the open-vocabulary-first coding, 100% provenance, and not-advice constraints intact, and stays a structuring artifact, never an eligibility determination.
objective: Specify a model extension that generalizes the eligibility data model to additional pediatric sarcomas after the Ewing model is proven.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension is scoped to begin only after the Ewing model is proven (post-M2).
Open-vocabulary-first coding, 100% provenance, and not-advice constraints are preserved.
Scope additions are grounded in open-registry sources with verified licensing before ingest.
Remains a structuring artifact; introduces no eligibility determination or medical advice.
